headline: “Compute Is the New Oil”: Kalshi Just Launched a Way to Bet on the Future Price of AI Computing Power
summary: Kalshi just launched a way to trade the future price of AI computing power, putting a CFTC-regulated startup on a collision course with the two biggest names in derivatives. The exchange that wins this land grab could own a market its founders say will eventually dwarf oil futures.

headline: CME Group (CME) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
summary: CME (CME) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on CME Group, Lowers Price Target to $295
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Patrick Moley   maintains CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $329 to $295.

headline: CME Group (CME) Launches Treasury Link And A New Agriculture Index
summary: CME Group (NasdaqGS:CME) has launched Treasury Link, a tool that connects U.S. Treasury futures and cash markets for centralized spread trading. The company has also introduced a comprehensive Agriculture Index that tracks the performance of key global farm sectors. Both products represent new platforms within CME Group’s derivatives and benchmarking offerings for institutional and commercial clients. CME Group, known for its global derivatives exchanges, is adding Treasury Link and a broad...
